checklist.name: R42 is reparameterized by c with m=8c+2 and x=z=c
c-band support atoms cover the sampled qtime-missing supports
first c-band qtime model fits slopes but leaves nine intercept atoms per parity
two-sample bad-intercept split suggests a small next carry alphabet
checklist.note: This is treated as provisional evidence only.

checklist.name: larger stress test refutes the simple one/two-feature split
unresolved atom is not uniformly rescued by tested depth-three features
R42-odd is not rescued by the tested phase-shifted depth-three carry grammar
checklist.note: This is a two-prime modular screen for the natural next odd-q phase-shifted model, not a no-go theorem for all R42-odd state variables.

checklist.name: R42 remains non-promoted as a Route-E theorem

objective: Explain or refute B42/R42 using the c-band clock-carry transducer program.
recommendation: Split R42 into mod-96 sub-branches.  Keep R42-even as a depth-three carry candidate, but do not promote the full R42 residue.  For R42-odd, the tested phase-shifted depth-three grammar failed; continue only with a genuinely new raw zero-clock winner/carry state.

scope.not_refuted: R42-even depth-three carry candidate; all conceivable full layered R42 transducers; R42-odd models with a genuinely new raw zero-clock winner/carry state
scope.refuted: tested one-piece c-band threshold/residue carry promotion; tested R42-odd phase-shifted depth-three carry grammar
